THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KON, MEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 118 TAYLOR STREET, #308, S.F., STAYED UNTIL SEP-16-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. PLTF WVS BACK RENT & DAMAGES UNLESS DFT FAILS TO COMPLY, THEN DFT TO PAY $625- BACK RENT+$16.67 PER DAY FROM 8/15 THRU 9/16/97 + $165- COSTS. MUTUAL WVR OF CLAIMS.PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED.NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO POSSESSION.SECURITY DEPOSIT IF ANY ACCORDING TO LAW.
